history.angle: Ad automation is getting smarter, which makes billing reliability more important for media buyers.
history.copy:
Campaign automation is moving fast.

Teams can launch tests, rotate creative, and scale budgets in hours. But billing setup still breaks momentum when cards fail or top-up takes too long.

RichXPay gives media buyers a simpler path: fund with USDT or USDC, issue a virtual card, and keep Meta Ads, Google Ads, and Amazon spend moving.

history.angle: Global payment rails are improving, but operational friction still sits at funding and card issuance.
history.copy:
Cross-border payments are getting faster.

The user-facing side of global commerce keeps improving. Wallets are smoother, checkout is cleaner, and expectations are higher. The slower layer is often internal: funding, card access, and spend control.

RichXPay is built for that layer. Teams can top up with USDT or USDC, issue a virtual card quickly, and use it for global software, services, and wallet-linked payments.
sourceTitles: Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way.
